home.lede: Ukufunyanwa kunye nokulawula ukuqinisekiswa kwe-Vortex inethiwekhi yontanga.
home.fingerprintDesc: Faka esi sitshixo sikawonke-wonke kumxhasi wakho we-Vortex. Yonke impendulo evela kumlawuli isayinwe nayo - ukungafani kuthetha ukuba kukho umntu ophazamisayo.
home.step2: Khetha i-Global imo yenethiwekhi kwi-wizard yokucwangcisa.
home.step3: Ncamathelisa i-URL yesilawuli (esisonjululwe ngokuzenzekelayo nge-SNS) okanye i-URL yokungena kwesi siza.
home.step4: Qinisekisa i-pubkey kwi-app yakho ihambelana noshicilelo lweminwe olungasentla.
home.step5: Uqhagamshelwe. Yonke enye into (uluhlu lweenodi, imisayino) iphathwa ngokuzenzekelayo.
home.nodesDesc: Bonke oontanga ababhalisiweyo, iintsimbi zabo, isiphelo, kunye nemithombo yokuqinisekisa.
home.entriesDesc: Ii-URL ze-Bootstrap zabathengi bokuqala - Cloudflare itonela, Tor, IPFS, ngqo.
home.mirrorsDesc: Iinginginya ezizezinye ezinikezela ngesiqulatho sinye esayiniweyo xa kujongwa.
home.securityDesc: Ucazululo olupheleleyo lwento eqinisekisiweyo, yintoni engangqinwanga, kwaye ngoba.

nodes.title: Amanqaku abhalisiweyo
nodes.lede: Yonke intanga umlawuli uyazi ngayo. Abathengi bafunda olu luhlu, qinisekisa utyikityo, kwaye ukhethe indawo yokunxibelelana ngokusekwe kubunzima. I-node entsha etywiniweyo ifumana ubunzima be-1.0; iindawo ezidala okanye ezingavalwanga zibola ukuya ku-0 ukuze itrafikhi ihambe iyokuphila, oontanga abathembekileyo kuphela.
nodes.legendDualD: Ibhaliswe kunye nomlawuli KWAYE itywinwe kwi-chain ngokusebenzisa Solana. Amangqina amabini azimeleyo aqinisekisa ikhowudi ye-hash.
nodes.legendCtrlD: Ibhaliswe kunye HTTP isilawuli. Utyikityo lungqina ukuba i-node ingumnini isitshixo sayo sabucala, kodwa ingqibelelo yekhowudi ayixhonywanga kwikhonkco.
nodes.legendUnverifD: Eyaziwayo kwifayile yoqwalaselo okanye intlebendwane. Ayikaqinisekiswa. Phatha ngononophelo - nabani na unokuthengisa i-pubkey de ubungqina bufike.

entries.title: Ii-URL zokungena
entries.lede: Amanqaku okuqalisa kumthengi ongenaontanga. I-URL nganye yokungena yindlela yokufikelela kumlawuli - ngokusebenzisa itonela ye-Cloudflare, Tor, IPFS isango, okanye i-domain ngqo. Khuphela nayiphi na enye kwi-app yakho ye-Vortex kuphehlelelo lokuqala.
entries.typeTunnelD: Mahala *.trycloudflare.com idilesi. Akukho akhawunti ifunekayo. I-URL iyatshintsha xa itonela iphinda iqala — phatha njengeephemeral.
entries.typeTorD: .idilesi yetswele, ifumaneka kuphela nge-Tor. Ubungqina bokubala, bucotha. Ifuna Tor umxhasi okanye ibhulorho.
entries.typeIpfsD: Ikopi enedilesi yomxholo ye-static frontend. Inikezelwe kuyo nayiphi na i-IPFS yesango - akukho mncedisi omnye wokuvimba.
entries.typeDirectD: Isizinda esiqhelekileyo + TLS. Ukukhawuleza kodwa kuthintelwe kwinqanaba le-DNS/IP.

mirrors.title: Iziza zesipili
mirrors.lede: Iindawo ezizezinye ezinikezela ngesiqulatho esisayiniweyo esifanayo nale ndawo. Iluncedo ukuba vortexx.sol ivaliwe kwi-DNS/ISP yakho. Isibuko ngasinye sijongwa ngamaxesha athile - ichaphaza elinemibala libonisa umphumo wokugqibela weprobe.
mirrors.healthyD: Ndiphendle kwimizuzu emi-5 kwaye ndaphendula Kulungile. Kukhuselekile ukusebenzisa ngoku. Ukubambezeleka kubonisiwe ekhadini.
mirrors.unreachableD: Uphononongo lokugqibela aluphumelelanga — unxibelelwano lwaliwe, ukuphela kwexesha, 5xx. Isipili sisenokuba siphantsi, sivalekile, okanye sigcwele kakhulu. Zama elandelayo.
mirrors.noprobeD: Tor .itswele mirrors alinakujongwa impilo ngaphandle kommeleli wengingqi Tor. Ubume ayaziwa - sebenzisa i-browser ye-Tor ukuvavanya.

security.title: Imodeli yokhuseleko
security.lede: Kanye yintoni eqinisekisiweyo ngokufihlakeleyo, engeyiyo, kwaye isitshixo ngasinye kwisistim sizuza njani - okanye siphulukene - ukuthembela kwakho. Funda oku phambi kokuba uqhagamshele abathengi abatsha kwisilawuli ongazibambisi ngokwakho.
security.treasurySub: Isikhwama se-Solana esifumana iimali zeprotocol (iifizi zokubhalisa ezivela kwiindawo ezintsha + i-20% yokunqunyulwa kwe-premium subscriptions) kwaye isasaze yonke into njengembuyekezo kubaqhubi abasebenzayo. Nabani na angaphicotha imali engenayo/ephumayo kwikhonkco.
security.treasury1: On-chain transparency — idilesi engasentla yeyomnini §vortexx.sol ku Solana Inkonzo yeGama. Yonke into engenayo (iintlawulo zerejista, imirhumo) kunye nentlawulo nganye yembuyekezo yintengiselwano esayiniweyo Solana — iqinisekiswa nguye nabani na, kuquka nawe.
security.treasury2: Ulwahlulo lwentlawulo - 70% yobhaliso lweprimiyamu nganye iya kwiphuli yembuyekezo (isasazwe i-pro-rata kwiinodi ngokusetyenziswa + i-stake), i-20% yophuhliso lwemali engundoqo, i-10% itshiswe / ibanjwe njenge-inshurensi. Iintlawulo zokubhalisa i-anchor node yesazisi kunye ne-anti-sybil.
security.treasury3: Custody caveat - de kusetyenziswe ikhontrakthi ehlakaniphile yokuhlawula, unondyebo usebenza njengomgcini wexeshana. Oku kubhalwe ngokunyanisekileyo apha kwaye kulandelwa esidlangalaleni. Ikhontrakthi ye-smart iya kuthatha indawo yokugcinwa kwesandla ngesandla xa kuphicothwa + umhlaba wolawulo olululo.
